message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 25
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor DefaultMQProducerImpl as D
participant Validators as V
participant MQClientManager as M
participant MQClientInstance as I
participant MQClientAPIImpl as A
participant PullMessageService as P
participant RebalanceService as R

D -> V : checkConfig
V --> D : result

activate D
D -> M : getInstance
activate M
M -> M : getAndCreateMQClientInstance
create I
M -> I : new
M --> D : mQClientFactory: MQClientInstance
deactivate M

D -> I : registerProducer
D -> I : start
activate I

I -> A : start
I -> I : startScheduledTask
I -> P : start
I -> R : start

I --> D : start
D -> I : sendHeartbeatToAllBrokerWithLock

deactivate I
deactivate D

== start 结束 ==

@enduml
```
